name: The Arc of North Dakota
description: State chapter of The Arc promoting and protecting the rights of people with intellectual and developmental disabilities in North Dakota.

name: North Dakota Early Intervention Program
description: North Dakota's early intervention services for infants and toddlers from birth to age 3 with developmental delays or disabilities.

name: Special Olympics North Dakota
description: Year-round sports training and athletic competition for North Dakotans with intellectual disabilities.

name: Sanford Children's Hospital - Developmental and Behavioral Pediatrics
description: Comprehensive developmental and behavioral pediatric evaluations and treatment services for children in the Fargo region.

name: Protection & Advocacy Project of North Dakota
description: North Dakota's designated protection and advocacy organization providing legal services and advocacy for people with disabilities.

name: North Dakota Assistive Technology (NDAT)
description: Statewide program providing assistive technology device demonstrations, loans, and information for North Dakotans with disabilities.

name: North Dakota ABLE Account
description: Tax-advantaged savings accounts for eligible North Dakotans with disabilities to save without affecting means-tested benefits.

name: North Dakota Department of Health and Human Services - Developmental Disabilities
description: State agency providing developmental disability services, Medicaid waivers, and supports for North Dakotans with disabilities.

name: Camp Grassick
description: Residential summer camp for children and adults with disabilities in North Dakota providing outdoor activities and recreation.

name: Pathfinder Parent Center
description: North Dakota's parent training and information center providing support and resources for families of children with disabilities.

name: North Dakota Vocational Rehabilitation
description: State services helping North Dakotans with disabilities prepare for, find, and maintain competitive employment.

name: North Dakota Medicaid HCBS Waivers
description: Medicaid waiver programs providing home and community-based services for North Dakotans with disabilities.

name: MATBUS Paratransit
description: ADA paratransit service providing demand-responsive transportation for eligible riders with disabilities in the Fargo-Moorhead area.
